title: Kidambi Srikanth in US Open Final
indian_angle: Indian star Kidambi Srikanth has reached the final of the US Open, showcasing his return to top form.
summary: Kidambi Srikanth has advanced to the final of the US Open, marking a significant achievement for the Indian shuttler.

title: Rounak Chouhan Upsets World No 6 at US Open
indian_angle: Young Indian shuttler Rounak Chouhan created a major upset by defeating World No 6 Chou Tien Chen at the US Open.
summary: Rounak Chouhan, a self-proclaimed Cristiano Ronaldo fan, made headlines by beating the World No 6 player at the US Open Super 300 tournament.

title: BAI Releases Addendum for Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships Selection
indian_angle: Badminton Association of India has issued further criteria for selecting young Indian talent for the upcoming Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has published an addendum to the selection criteria for the 2026 Badminton Asia U17 & U15 Junior Championships, detailing participation guidelines.

title: BAI Warns Against Unauthorized Badminton Leagues and Tournaments
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued an advisory to players and stakeholders regarding participation in unauthorized badminton leagues and tournaments.
summary: An advisory from BAI cautions against involvement in unsanctioned badminton events, emphasizing the need for official approval for all competitions.

title: India to Host BWF World Championships 2026
indian_angle: India has expressed interest in hosting the prestigious BWF World Championships in 2026, a significant event for Indian badminton.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has released an Expression of Interest (EOI) for hosting the BWF World Championships in 2026, signaling a major upcoming event for the country.
